nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
 

  • Uses of TransactionQueryFacade in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query

    Methods in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query that return TransactionQueryFacade
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TransactionQueryFacade
    TransactionQueryFacade.accounts(Collection<String> accounts, boolean requireAll)
    Filters transactions by account membership.
    TransactionQueryFacade
    TransactionQueryFacade.dateRange(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Filters transactions by date range (inclusive) using the booking date timestamp.
    TransactionQueryFacade
    TransactionQueryFacade.filterByTransactionType(String transactionType)
    Filters transactions by the transaction type stored in the info map (matching transactionType or type keys).
    TransactionQueryFacade
    TransactionQueryFacade.memoContains(String memoContains)
    Filters by memo substring.
